---
title: "Code Chunks"
author: "nope"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    toc: true                
    toc-title: My contents   
    toc-location: right 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 127px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 350px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme:  
      light: sketchy
      dark:  darkly
    fontsize: 16px    
self-contained: true 
lang: en                
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
---
